title: Green Campus Hackathon
description: A 24‑hour hackathon focused on sustainability solutions for campus life.

title: Campus Tree‑Planting Day
description: Students and staff gather to plant native trees around the campus.

title: Sustainable Transportation Workshop
description: Learn about car‑pooling, bike‑sharing, and public‑transport options.

title: Eco‑Film Screening
description: Screening of documentaries on climate action followed by discussion.
